title: Apply for National Summer Camp Programme
description: Apply for the National Summer Camp Programme for your child.

config.subject: Your National Summer Camp Programme application has been received

steps.title: What is the child's date of birth?
steps.description: We use this to check which camps the child can apply for.

max.error: The child must be 15 years old or younger

min.error: The child must be at least 4 years old

steps.title: Choose location preferences
steps.description:
Choose the child's first choice location. You can add a second and third choice if you want.

The Ministry will consider the camp and location choices together. The child may not get a place in the camp or location you choose.

options.label: New Testament Church of God MERC
Bank Hall Church of The Nazarene

steps.title: Can camp staff get medical help for the child in an emergency?
steps.description: In an emergency, camp staff may need to give first aid, call a doctor or take the child for emergency care.

steps.title: Can the Ministry take photos or videos of the child during camp activities?
steps.description: Photos or videos may be used to show National Summer Camp Programme activities.

steps.title: Check your answers
steps.description: Check your answers before you send your application.

steps.title: Declaration

options.label:
I declare that:

* the information I gave is correct
* I am the child's parent or guardian
* I understand the information may be checked
* I have read the camp rules
* I have talked with the child about the camp rules
* I understand applying does not mean the child has a place at camp
* I understand the child may have to leave camp if they break the camp rules or put anyone at risk

required.error: You must confirm before submitting the application

steps.title: Application submitted
